title: Section Writing Plan: White-Box FA4 B200 Predictor
summary: Section jobs, source inputs, claim limits, and display requirements for the real-hardware paper draft.

abstract.job: Summarize problem, method, real-hardware result, and limitation in 150 words.

introduction.job: Motivate white-box prediction; explain the emulator-to-silicon correction arc; state contributions.
claim_limits: distinguish emulator preliminary from silicon final

related_work.job: Position against FlashAttention family, GPU roofline models, Blackwell work.

method.job: Describe workload quantities, baseline roofline, bounded corrections, launch overhead, NCU bottleneck calibration.

experiments.job: Describe matrix, real measurement protocol, NCU subset, metrics.

results.job: Report emulator preliminary, refuted first pass, improved pass, refined pass, per-precision and worst-case analysis.
claim_limits: include refuted pass as negative result

limitations.job: List fp4, compute-only NCU labels, synthetic matrix, driver-specific calibration.
